action_boundary: Should demo onboarding OB8-016 proceed for applicant AP8-016?
communication_boundary: An apparent name match is not a block after exact disambiguation. Use identity attributes and disposition status.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, benefits, utility, public-sector, or operational data.
